title: Things Retextured
description: That's a little modified version for most of Things Mod textures, made for better compatibility with the Create Venture Modpack recipes.
body:
That's a little modified version for most of Things Mod textures, made for better compatibility with the Create Venture Modpack recipes.

**THIS TEXTURE IS ABSOLUTELY FREE TO USE FOR ANYONE WHO LIKES IT IN THEIR OWN MODPACKS, NO MENTION REQUIRED.**
